'''[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Heron Strobestock''' was a petty knight of [[House Barnaba]], that governed the [[Barnaba Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], and a officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. He was married to Dame [[Elspeth Strobestock]].<ref name="LOTE" />

It was said that he was a rising star in some august Imperial circles and his heroic exploits were often talked about among the noble classes in the Tapani Sector, especially when his wife was present to enhance the stories.<ref name="LOTE">

There was talk of elevating him to baron if he returned home long enough to attract a sponsor.<ref name="LOTE" />
